## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I find it difficult to analyze payload structures when...").

---

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you envision the feature working.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions, workarounds, or features you have considered.

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, visual wireframes, or reference examples about the feature request here.
